name: Get Loan Group Data For Application
script:
if doc.applicant:  # or self.loan_member_application
    # Fetch the Loan Group from the Loan Member
    loan_member_doc = frappe.get_doc("Loan Member", doc.applicant)
    # loan_group_name = loan_member_doc.group  # This is the Link field in Loan Member
    if loan_member_doc.group:  # assuming 'group' is Link field in Loan Member
        loan_group_doc = frappe.get_doc("Loan Group", loan_member_doc.group)

        # Set it in Loan Application (if you have a field to store it)
        doc.db_set("loan_group", loan_group_doc.group_name)  # make sure field exists in Loan Application

name: Validate Duplicate Time in Company
